subtitle: Stock picks with full thesis
promotional_text: 97+ picks. Full thesis on every position. Real performance history. $0.99/month.
description:
A new stock pick every week — with the full thesis: what the company does, why we picked it, the real risk we're watching, and the numbers that matter.

Not a generic newsletter. A real portfolio: $50 invested in each position, transparent track record from day one, performance published as-is — mistakes and all.

WHAT YOU GET
• Full thesis on every pick: what the company does, why we picked it, the key risk
• Financial data: P/E ratio, forward P/E, market cap, analyst consensus
• Curated news that affects your portfolio — no noise
• Complete performance history (97+ picks across 20 cycles)
• Real-time portfolio with live prices and return per position

HOW IT WORKS
We invest $50 per position. Every pick comes with a WhatsApp message and full written research. You see our actual track record, unedited.

WHAT WE'RE NOT
Vectorial Data is an editorial publishing service — not personalized investment advice. We operate under the publisher's exclusion (Section 202(a)(11)(D) of the U.S. Investment Advisers Act). Past performance does not guarantee future results. Always consult a qualified financial advisor.

SUBSCRIPTION
$0.99 per month. No contracts. Cancel anytime from your Apple ID settings.
Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
release_notes: First release of Vectorial Data on the App Store.

subscription_product.description: Full access to all picks, research, and portfolio history.
